latHint: Think reliability and confidence - not riverbanks.
pivHint: A river BANK holds the water in - but you also BANK on someone. What word means to rely on?
winText: You can count on it. BANK was the pivot - river's edge to placing your TRUST.
lossText: TRUST - to rely on or have confidence in. BANK was the pivot: river's edge to BANK on someone.
